hook.text: Tell the network what you want, not how. Intent-based networking turns goals into configs.

buildup.text: Say: 'video gets priority over email.' The system creates QoS rules across every device automatically.

discovery.text: The network verifies intent is being met. If conditions change, configs adapt automatically.

twist.text: Cisco DNA Center and Juniper Apstra lead IBN. They abstract complexity for network operators.

climax.text: Closed-loop automation: declare intent, deploy, verify, remediate. The network manages itself.

punchline.text: Say what you want, not how to build it. Networks that understand goals.

quiz.question: What does intent-based networking automate?
options: Translating business policies into network configurations automatically
